Body.Content:
Use a prepaid capacity pack as the sole billing method for supported Copilot experiences. Admins can configure billing policies with prepaid capacity such that usage for users in the policy is deducted exclusively from prepaid capacity credits, with no pay as you go charges.

GA date: April CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft 365 admin center: Copilot - Billing and usage - Standalone consumption of prepaid capacity pack credits
